programme.title: 🌊 1.5m @ 12s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
Supertubos at 1.5m with onshore wind? Could be worse, could be better; I've seen worse days producing the odd barrel.
🌊 Swell: 1.5m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 13.0km/h W (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 23.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.4m

programme.title: 🌊 1.5m @ 12s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
Supertubos at 1.5m with onshore wind? Could be worse, could be better; I've seen worse days producing the odd barrel.

programme.title: 🌊 1.5m @ 12s ONSHORE
programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 1.5m @ 12s CROSS
programme.desc:
1.5m and a crosswind? Might be alright for a swim; the waves will be... sporting.
🌊 Swell: 1.5m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 13.0km/h W (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 23.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.4m

programme.title: 🌊 1.5m @ 12s CROSS
programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 1.5m @ 12s CROSS
programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 1.5m @ 12s CROSS
programme.desc:

programme.desc:

programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 2.3m @ 12s CROSS
programme.desc:

programme.desc:

programme.desc:
